title: Bridge Essay: Quantum Physics Perspective on Electromagnetic and Quantum Fields Inside the Bra

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Nondual/Unity** (Phase 16) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Nondual/Unity to mechanistic neuroscience through Quantum, Physics, Perspective, on, Electromagnetic.

**Quantum Physics Perspective on Electromagnetic and Quantum Fields Inside the Brain.** — Malays J Med Sci. PMID: 32158340. DOI: 10.21315/mjms2020.27.1.1. Brain energy is associated commonly with electrochemical type of energy. This energy is displayed in the form of electromagnetic waves or better known as brainwaves. This concept is aclassical concept (Newtonian) in which the studied object, that is the brain is viewed as alarge anatomical object with its functional brainwaves.
